svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 35, 126), rgb(191, 199, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(26, 35, 126), rgb(191, 199, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 100px; margin-left: 11px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 105, 92), rgb(97, 187, 176)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 105, 92), rgb(97, 187, 176));
